title: Orbital Mechanics Basics
summary: How orbital dynamics affect combat near gravitational bodies.
details: Near planets/moons, orbits matter. Higher orbit = slower orbital velocity. To catch ship ahead, drop to lower orbit (counter-intuitive). Gravity wells affect pursuit - ship diving toward planet accelerates. Escaping gravity requires specific velocity. Combat in orbit differs from deep space - trajectories curve. Use gravity assist to change velocity efficiently. Planets provide sensor shadow but limit maneuver options.
annotations: Orbital combat adds complexity layer to maneuvers.
Deep space combat is simpler - straight-line physics.
